scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build
scripts.start:backend: set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8&& cd backend && venv\Scripts\uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && py -3.12 -m venv venv && venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt
